---
    name: Feature request
    about: Suggest a new capability or enhancement for skill-engine
    title: "[Feature] "
    labels: ["enhancement"]
    assignees: ["nick-railsback"]
    ---

    ## Problem statement

    <!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the friction, the missing capability, or the workflow that doesn't fit today. Ground it in a concrete situation rather than an abstract wish — "I tried X and hit Y" beats "it should do Z". -->

    ## Proposed solution

    <!-- How would you like skill-engine to handle this? Sketch the workflow, the slash command, or the doctrine change at whatever fidelity feels natural. Rough is fine; the goal is to anchor the discussion. -->

    ## Alternatives considered

    <!-- Other approaches you weighed and why they didn't fit. Including "I tried X workaround" or "tool Y handles this by Z" helps locate the proposal in the design space. -->

    ## Fit with existing workflows

    <!-- Does this extend an existing workflow (discover / refresh / status / self-audit / new-reference / engine-bootstrap / scaffold / clean-cache), or does it introduce a new surface? If it introduces a new surface, what's the trigger and where does it live? -->

    ## Additional context

    <!-- Concrete examples, references to similar tools, or links to prior discussion. -->
